name: Air Jordan 9 Retro (Black)
description:
The Air Jordan 9 Retro boots combine elements from the Special Field boots and MJ's signature 9th racing shoe, designed by Tinker Hatfield and released in 1993. The durable design is built to withstand harsh weather conditions without compromising its classic appeal. The upper features durable leather, a textile-lined tongue, metal eyelets, and a thick tread. Air Zoom cushioning in the heel and forefoot provides soft bounce and buffers impact between the foot and the ground.
- Upper made of leather, textile, and plastic
- Molded foam insole
- Round laces
- Heel pull tab
- Not intended for use as personal protective equipment (PPE)
- Country/Region of manufacture: China

name: Pique Signature 90s Tee (Black)
description:
The Signature 90s Pique Tee is made from medium-weight cotton/poly pique knit. The crewneck tee features a 90s fit with oversized proportions and dropped shoulders. Minimalist branding includes an embroidered Essentials signature logo on the front, and Essentials signature label at the back collar.
- 80% COTTON, 20% POLYESTER 265GSM

- RIB-KNIT CUFFS, AND WAIST HEM

description:
- Regular Fit: wider at the chest while still maintaining a modern silhouette.
- Rib-knit mockneck. Full-zip front. Rib-knit armholes.
- Two front waist zipped pockets. Rib-knit hem.
- Signature embroidered Pony at the left chest.
- 100% cotton. Machine washable. Imported.
- By choosing our cotton products, you're supporting our investment in the Better Cotton™ mission to help cotton communities survive and thrive, while protecting and restoring the environment.

description:
- Relaxed Fit.
- Rib-knit Polo collar. Three-button placket. Woven trim at the placket facing. Genuine horn buttons.
- Long sleeves with rib-knit cuffs.
- Left chest patch pocket.
- Rib-knit hem.
- Shell: 75% silk, 25% linen. Placket facing: 43% linen, 36% silk, 21% cotton. Dry clean. Made in Italy.
- Due to the natural characteristics of this material, the coloring may rub off onto fabrics and upholstery.

name: Chrome Hearts Cashmere Cross Patch Cardigan (Black)
description: This elegant cardigan seamlessly blends classic style with street style. The shawl collar adds dimension and a touch of sophistication to the overall look. With its full-length front buttons, it's easy to wear and can be styled open or closed.A striking cross patch adorns the chest, reflecting a cool and unique character. Two functional front pockets add convenience and a subtle detail. The soft knit fabric is comfortable to wear, perfect for layering on days when you want stylish warmth.Ideal for those who prefer a smart yet edgy look, suitable for casual days or semi-formal occasions, elevating a simple outfit to a more refined level.

name: Chrome Hearts Gradient Logo T-shirt (Black)
description: This minimalist t-shirt emphasizes a clean, stylish look with subtle details. A small graphic logo on the chest adds a focal point without being overwhelming, giving it a clean, street style feel that's easy to wear every day.The standard fit is comfortable and allows for easy movement. It's perfect for wearing alone or layering with a jacket and street-style pants. The overall design focuses on simplicity while maintaining a distinct identity.Ideal for those who appreciate minimalism but still want small details to add character to their look.

name: Chrome Hearts X Comme Des Garcons Rare Restock (Black)
description: This short-sleeved T-shirt features a striking design with a gothic-style lettering pattern covering the entire front, creating a unique and eye-catching street fashion look. The logo and graphics are designed with overlapping and gradient sizes, creating dimension and movement on the shirt. The straight-cut fabric is comfortable to wear, perfect for both casual and edgy looks on relaxed days. The back features a simple, minimalist design that perfectly contrasts with the vibrant front. Ideal for fashionistas who want something different and unique in one garment.

name: Chrome Hearts X Comme Des Garcons Rare Restock (White)
description: This short-sleeved T-shirt features a striking design with a gothic-style lettering pattern covering the entire front, creating a unique and eye-catching street fashion look. The logo and graphics are designed with overlapping and gradient sizes, creating dimension and movement on the shirt. The straight-cut fabric is comfortable to wear, perfect for both casual and edgy looks on relaxed days. The back features a simple, minimalist design that perfectly contrasts with the vibrant front. Ideal for fashionistas who want something different and unique in one garment.

name: Dior Reversible Saddle Belt
description:
Material: Smooth calfskin leather with metal buckle
Brief description:
A luxury reversible belt featuring Dior’s iconic Saddle-style buckle. The belt can be worn on two sides for different looks and is crafted from high-quality calfskin leather, combining durability with elegant French fashion design.

name: Dior Key Ring Black Smooth Calfskin
description:
Material: Smooth calfskin leather with antique silver-finish brass
Brief description:
A minimalist luxury key ring featuring Dior branding and metal hardware. Designed to hold keys securely while adding a subtle luxury accessory to everyday carry.

name: Dior Key Case Black Dior Oblique Jacquard
description:
Material: Dior Oblique jacquard canvas with leather trim
Brief description:
A compact luxury key case featuring Dior’s signature Oblique pattern. It includes multiple key hooks and a secure fold design, making it both stylish and practical for organizing keys.

name: Seiko 5 Sports SRPD55
description:
Material: Stainless steel case and bracelet with Hardlex crystal
Brief description:
A durable automatic sports watch featuring a stainless-steel case, rotating bezel, and day-date display. It uses Seiko’s automatic movement with about a 41-hour power reserve and is designed for everyday wear with sporty styling.

name: Seiko Presage Cocktail Time SRPB43
description:
Material: Stainless steel case with leather strap
Brief description:
An elegant dress watch from Seiko’s Presage line inspired by cocktail culture. It features a textured dial, automatic movement, and a refined design suitable for formal or business wear.

name: Seiko Prospex Turtle SRP777
description:
Material: Stainless steel case with rubber strap
Brief description:
A professional diver-style watch known for its “Turtle” shaped case. It offers strong water resistance and a robust automatic movement, making it popular among divers and outdoor enthusiasts.

name: Seiko SKX Stainless Steel Watch Bracelet 44G1JZ
description:
Material: Stainless steel case with rubber strap
Brief description:
A professional diver-style watch known for its “Turtle” shaped case. It offers strong water resistance and a robust automatic movement, making it popular among divers and outdoor enthusiastsMaterial: Stainless steel
Brief description:
A replacement metal bracelet designed for Seiko dive watches such as the SKX series. It provides durability, corrosion resistance, and a secure clasp for daily wear.

name: Gucci Interlocking G Bracelet
description:
Material: Sterling silver
Brief description:
A minimalist bracelet featuring Gucci’s iconic Interlocking G logo. The polished sterling silver design gives a clean luxury look suitable for everyday wear.

name: Gucci GG Marmont Leather Belt Gold Buckle
description:
Material: Calf leather with antique gold-tone brass buckle
Brief description:
A classic Gucci belt featuring the recognizable Double G buckle. Made from smooth calf leather, it is one of the brand’s most popular accessories and pairs easily with casual or formal outfits.

name: Gucci Bee Crystal & Faux Pearl Stud Earrings
description:
Material: Metal with toned finish
Brief description:
Small stud earrings featuring Gucci’s signature bee motif, a symbol frequently used in the brand’s collections. The design is elegant and subtle, making it suitable for daily wear.

name: Gucci GG Supreme Card Holder
description:
Material: GG Supreme coated canvas with leather trim
Brief description:
A compact card holder featuring the iconic GG monogram pattern. Lightweight and durable, it is designed to carry essential cards while maintaining a slim profile.

name: Louis Vuitton LV Initiales 40mm Belt
description:
Material: Monogram coated canvas with calf leather lining
Brief description:
A classic Louis Vuitton belt featuring the large LV Initiales metal buckle. The belt uses the iconic Monogram canvas and is reversible in some versions, making it versatile for both casual and formal outfits.

name: Louis Vuitton Monogram Eclipse Multiple Wallet
description:
Material: Monogram Eclipse coated canvas with cowhide leather lining
Brief description:
A compact wallet designed for everyday use. It features the dark Monogram Eclipse pattern, multiple card slots, and compartments while keeping a slim and stylish profile.

name: Louis Vuitton M00250 Bracelet Nanogram Cuff LV Monogram silver
description:
Material: Toned metal with engraved Monogram pattern
Brief description:
An elegant open cuff bracelet engraved with Louis Vuitton’s Monogram and LV motifs. The minimalist design makes it easy to stack with other jewelry or wear alone as a statement piece.

name: Louis Vuitton Monogram Silk Scarf (Black)
description:
Material: 100% silk
Brief description:
A lightweight luxury scarf featuring the iconic LV Monogram pattern across smooth silk fabric. It can be styled around the neck, hair, or handbag for a refined fashion accent.

name: Louis Vuitton Monogram Silk Scarf (Grey)
description:
Material: 100% silk
Brief description:
A lightweight luxury scarf featuring the iconic LV Monogram pattern across smooth silk fabric. It can be styled around the neck, hair, or handbag for a refined fashion accent.

name: Hermès Clic H Bracelet Black
description:
Material: Pl metal with enamel
Brief description:
A signature Hermès bracelet featuring the “H” clasp at the center. The enamel band comes in many colors and the sleek hinge design makes it easy to wear while keeping a sophisticated luxury look.

name: Hermès H Buckle Reversible Belt (Macassar / Vert Amande)
description:
Material: Calfskin leather with palladium-plated metal buckle
Brief description:
A classic Hermès accessory featuring the recognizable H-shaped buckle. The reversible leather strap allows two different color options, making it versatile for both casual and formal outfits.

name: Clic, C'est Noue scarf (Black / Noir)
description:
Material: 100% silk
Brief description:
A slim silk scarf known as the Twilly, often used to decorate handbags, wear as a neck scarf, or style in hair. It features colorful Hermès patterns and detailed prints inspired by art and equestrian themes.

name: Clic, C'est Noue scarf (Cream / Craie)
description:
Material: 100% silk
Brief description:
A slim silk scarf known as the Twilly, often used to decorate handbags, wear as a neck scarf, or style in hair. It features colorful Hermès patterns and detailed prints inspired by art and equestrian themes.

name: Hermès Kelly Double Tour Bracelet Noir Palladium Plated
description:
Material: Swift calfskin leather with Toned-plated hardware
Brief description:
Inspired by the iconic Kelly bag, this bracelet wraps twice around the wrist and secures with a small turn-lock clasp. The double-wrap design gives it a distinctive elegant appearance.

name: Chanel Quilted Lambskin Card Holder
description:
Material: Quilted lambskin leather with toned metal logo
Brief description:
A compact card holder designed with Chanel’s signature diamond quilting pattern and small CC logo. It provides several slots for credit cards and is ideal for minimalist everyday use.

name: Chanel 2BB Silk Twill Hair Scarf (Ecru / Black)
description:
Material: 100% silk twill
Brief description:
A stylish silk scarf featuring Chanel branding and elegant patterns. It can be worn in the hair, around the neck, or tied to a handbag to add a refined fashion accent.

name: Black Sportswear Tech Fleece Windrunner Womens
description:
Update your workout gear with Nike's Sportswear Tech Fleece Windrunner. Inspired by nature and made from cosy fabric, this women's jacket is ideal for gym sessions and everyday wear. So whether you're powering through a spin class or running errands, this top will see you through the day.
- Nike Swoosh on the chest adds a signature touch.
- Two zipped side seam pockets offer space for hands or essentials.
- Composition: Body / Hood lining: 53% cotton and 47% polyester. Pocket lining: 100% cotton.
- Care: Machine wash.
